description: Presenting super cute and extreme soft baby boys and baby girls plush fleece Jacquard Blankets, available in one size : 75 x 90 cm. The fluffy and soft material is a great way for them to explore their fingertips whilst snuggled up. Made from a 100% Polyester this material allows you to benefit from fabric properties such as: Fabulously Soft and Cosy - Soft to the touch against your newborn delicate skin- Designed with Care - to endure repeat washing, retaining its size and softness, High Quality - The double stitched seams assure a durable / long lasting blanket Available in a generous size - 75cm x 90cm. This would be keeping the little ones warm and cosy in their cot, pram, buggy, car seats, moss baskets or crib! This would also make a great gift idea for Birthdays, Christmas, Nappy Cakes, Baby Showers or Christenings! Limited stock availability, act now and get yours today! If you have any questions about this product then please don't hesitate to get in contact, our office hours are 9-5:30 and we try to reply within 24 hours
